supervisor.reason: The local installer repair scope is complete: scripts/install.sh now creates a ~/.local/bin launcher for the repository venv binary, conditionally adds ~/.local/bin to .bashrc when the current PATH is missing it, and focused installer validation plus a launcher smoke check passed.

bootstrap.goal: Repair scripts/install.sh so Ubuntu local installs expose a usable dormammu command with launcher and shell guidance.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the local installer repair slice. scripts/install.sh now creates a ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher, adds ~/.local/bin to .bashrc only when the current shell PATH is missing it, prints source ~/.bashrc guidance, passes python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_script, and the launcher smoke test succeeds.

items.text: Phase 1. Reproduce the Ubuntu local install flow for scripts/install.sh and identify why the installed command is not usable
Phase 2. Update the local install script to expose a runnable ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher backed by the repository .venv
Phase 3. Add idempotent .bashrc PATH bootstrapping and explicit shell reload guidance for the local install flow
Phase 4. Add and run regression coverage plus a local launcher smoke check for the repaired installer

next_action: Prepare a commit for the validated local installer repair, or extend the local install docs around the ~/.local/bin shell bootstrap flow.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets the scripts/install.sh local install path on Ubuntu-like shells.
The local installer now creates a ~/.local/bin/dormammu launcher that execs the repository venv binary.
The local installer only appends ~/.local/bin to .bashrc when the current shell PATH does not already include that directory.
Focused validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_script`.
Manual smoke verification passed by running ~/.local/bin/dormammu --help after installation.
